title: 1.1: Tests that DNS packet parsing decompresses pointer references into full domain names when a DNS frame contains advanced pointer compression across multiple records.
1.2: Tests that DNS packet parsing extracts target name, port, priority, weight values when SRV records appear with associated TXT record data.
1.3: Tests that DNS packet parsing resolves chained compression references into expanded names across multiple DNS record types.
1.4: Tests that building a DNS response then reparsing it maintains identical record names, record types, record data values.
2.1: Places the test for advanced DNS pointer compression parsing in test/scapy/layers/dns.uts.
2.2: Places the test for DNS SRV record parsing in test/scapy/layers/dns.uts.
2.3: Places the test for DNS frame parsing with chained decompression in test/scapy/layers/dns.uts
2.4: Places the test for DNS response serialization round trip behavior in test/scapy/layers/dns.uts.
3.1: All tests use Scapy .uts test format with standard Python assert statements for verification.
3.2: All tests follow the naming pattern of '= <Descriptive Test Name>' as the test header line.
3.3: All tests use a setup execute verify structure with packet construction  followed by assertions.
